sentences.en: I have to study, but I don't feel like it.
I'm not sleepy, but I have to sleep.
While I eat, I study a little Spanish.

sentences.t: 차 어디 세웠는지 찾느라 삼십 분을 썼어요.
sentences.en: I've spent half an hour looking for where I left the car.
sentences.r: cha eodi sewonneunji channeura samsip buneul sseosseoyo.

sentences.en: The whole family's in the kitchen talking.
What do you like to do on weekends?

sentences.t: 이번 주말엔 뭔가 다른 거 하고 싶어요.
sentences.en: I want to do something different this weekend.
sentences.r: ibeon jumaren mwonga dareun geo hago sipeoyo.

sentences.en: The cold makes me want to stay home.
I'm going to try a bit of yours.
I live next to a really nice park.
The meeting is Monday at ten.
Go two streets and turn left.

sentences.t: 일을 많이 해서 밥 먹을 시간이 없어요.
sentences.en: I don't have time to eat because I work a lot.
sentences.r: ireul mani haeseo bap meogeul sigani eopseoyo.

sentences.en: I'm good when I study a little every day.
I've known Marco since I learned to speak Spanish.
I go to bed late because I study at night.
Honestly, I don't know who you are.

sentences.t: 아는 사람이 많아서 아는 게 많아요.
sentences.en: She knows a lot because she knows a lot of people.
sentences.r: aneun sarami manaseo aneun ge manayo.

sentences.t: 너무 좋아서 내일 또 올 거예요.
sentences.en: I liked it so much that I'm coming back tomorrow.
sentences.r: neomu joaseo naeil tto ol geoyeyo.

sentences.t: 좀 자고 나니까 이제 좀 나아요.
sentences.en: I feel better now that I slept a bit.
sentences.r: jom jago nanikka ije jom naayo.

sentences.t: 다섯 시 전에 이거 끝내야 해요.
sentences.en: I have to finish this before five.
sentences.r: daseot si jeone igeo kkeunnaeya haeyo.

sentences.en: We'll go little by little, no rush.

sentences.t: 공부 다 끝낼 때까지 안 자요.
sentences.en: I don't go to bed until I finish studying.
sentences.r: gongbu da kkeunnael ttaekkaji an jayo.

sentences.en: We live in a small apartment but it's fine.
I'm going to wait until it's cheaper.
I'm just me, and that's already plenty.

sentences.t: 당신이 안 괜찮아서 그 사람이 걱정해요.
sentences.en: She's worried because you're not okay.
sentences.r: dangsini an gwaenchanaseo geu sarami geokjeonghaeyo.

sentences.t: 오늘 할 수 있는 건 다 할 거예요.
sentences.en: I'm going to do everything I can today.
sentences.r: oneul hal su inneun geon da hal geoyeyo.

sentences.en: My room's upstairs, next to the bathroom.
The doctor says it's nothing serious.

sentences.t: 이 책이 저 책보다 더 재밌어요.
sentences.en: This book is more interesting than the other one.
sentences.r: i chaegi jeo chaekboda deo jaemisseoyo.

sentences.en: My house is smaller than yours.
Marco says he's off to the brain gym.
It doesn't matter when you get here, I'll wait for you.

sentences.t: 왜 배우고 싶은지 스스로한테 물어보면 다 달라져요.
sentences.en: Ask yourself why you want to learn, and everything changes.
sentences.r: wae baeugo sipeunji seuseurohante mureobomyeon da dallajyeoyo.

sentences.en: You should be proud of what you've done.
It's cold outside, let's stay home.

sentences.t: 마르코는 절대 안 아파요, 그냥 빡세게 훈련 중일 뿐이에요.
sentences.en: Marco is never sick, he's just "training hard."
sentences.r: raenggwineun jeoldae an apayo, geunyang ppaksege hullyeon jungil ppunieyo.

sentences.en: I'd like to learn more, but I have little time.

sentences.t: 잘 말하고 싶으면 공부를 더 해야 해요.
sentences.en: I have to study more if I want to speak well.
sentences.r: jal malhago sipeumyeon gongbureul deo haeya haeyo.

sentences.t: 머리 아플 땐 일을 못 해요.
sentences.en: When my head hurts, I can't work.
sentences.r: meori apeul ttaen ireul mot haeyo.

sentences.en: I think I'm sick because everything hurts.

sentences.t: 먹을 게 없어서 장을 봐야 해요.
sentences.en: We have to buy food because we don't have anything.
sentences.r: meogeul ge eopseoseo jangeul bwaya haeyo.

sentences.en: When I'm hungry, I have no patience with anyone.
I feel like learning, but I'm also sleepy.
I don't like it when you say you can't.

sentences.t: 그렇게 많이 먹으면 안 되는데 너무 맛있어요.
sentences.en: I shouldn't eat so much, but it's so good.
sentences.r: geureoke mani meogeumyeon an doeneunde neomu masisseoyo.

sentences.t: 바빠도 언제든 도울 준비 돼 있어요.
sentences.en: Even though I'm busy, I'm always ready to help.
sentences.r: bappado eonjedeun doul junbi dwae isseoyo.

sentences.en: By the time you're back, I'll have everything ready.
If we leave now, we'll get there on time.
It's hot, so we're going to the beach.

sentences.t: 그 사람 먹고 일하고 공부하고 자요.
sentences.en: He eats, works, studies, and then goes to bed.
sentences.r: geu saram meokgo ilhago gongbuhago jayo.

sentences.t: 그 사람 자는 동안 저는 일어나서 공부해요.
sentences.en: While he sleeps, I get up and study.
sentences.r: geu saram janeun dongan jeoneun ireonaseo gongbuhaeyo.

sentences.t: 당신이 저보다 더 강한 것 같아요.
sentences.en: I think you're stronger than me.
sentences.r: dangsini jeoboda deo ganghan geot gatayo.

sentences.t: 어렸을 땐 우리 집이 더 컸어요.
sentences.en: When I was a kid, my house was bigger.
sentences.r: eoryeosseul ttaen uri jibi deo keosseoyo.

sentences.t: 저는 준비됐는데 그 사람은 아직 안 됐어요.
sentences.en: I'm ready, but she's not ready yet.
sentences.r: jeoneun junbidwaenneunde geu sarameun ajik an dwaesseoyo.

sentences.en: We're happy, but also a little nervous.
Every time I come here, I want to stay.
I don't know the answer, but I know how to look it up.
I know the answer, but I don't know the teacher.
I know people who think they know everything.
I don't know how much it costs, but I'm sure it's expensive.
My throat was hurting, but I'm better now.
I like this life, even though it's not perfect.
You know the problem, but you don't know the solution.
When I work from home, I eat in the kitchen.

sentences.t: 졸리면 잠이 필요한 거예요, 커피가 아니라.
sentences.en: If you're sleepy, you need sleep, not more coffee.
sentences.r: jollimyeon jami piryohan geoyeyo, keopiga anira.

sentences.en: Marco says he's ready, but he's nervous.
I'd like to sleep in, but I have to work.

sentences.t: 배고프면 눈에 보이는 첫 번째 걸 시켜요.
sentences.en: When I'm hungry, I order the first thing I see.
sentences.r: baegopeumyeon nune boineun cheot beonjjae geol sikyeoyo.

sentences.en: He told me it was cheap, but it cost a lot.

sentences.t: 더 잘할 수 있는 거 알아요, 계속하기만 하면 돼요.
sentences.en: I know I can get better, I just have to keep going.
sentences.r: deo jalhal su inneun geo arayo, gyesokagiman hamyeon dwaeyo.

sentences.en: Your phone's under the bed again.

sentences.t: 하루 종일 일하고 나서 공부 조금 해요.
sentences.en: I work all day and then study a bit.
sentences.r: haru jongil ilhago naseo gongbu jogeum haeyo.

sentences.en: The cat spends all day on the bed.

sentences.t: 그 사람 왜 아직 우리 가족을 안 만났는지 알아요?
sentences.en: Do you know why he hasn't met my family yet?
sentences.r: geu saram wae ajik uri gajogeul an mannanneunji arayo?

sentences.t: 그 식당에서 한 번 먹어 봤는데 좋았어요.
sentences.en: I ate at that place once and I liked it.
sentences.r: geu sikdangeseo han beon meogeo bwanneunde joasseoyo.

sentences.t: 그 사람은 멕시코 출신이고 저는 스페인 출신이에요.
sentences.en: He's from Mexico and I'm from Spain.
sentences.r: geu sarameun meksiko chulsinigo jeoneun seupein chulsini-eyo.

sentences.t: 당신 사정을 알고 어디 출신인지 알고 싶어요.
sentences.en: I want to know your story and learn where you come from.
sentences.r: dangsin sajeongeul algo eodi chulsininji algo sipeoyo.

sentences.en: I'm under the blankets and I don't want to get out.
The concert is at nine at night.

sentences.t: 덜 사고 돈을 더 모을 거예요.
sentences.en: I'm going to buy fewer things and save more money.
sentences.r: deol sago doneul deo moeul geoyeyo.

sentences.t: 예전엔 말을 아예 못 했는데 이제 조금 해요.
sentences.en: Before I didn't speak at all and now I speak a little.
sentences.r: yejeonen mareul aye mot haenneunde ije jogeum haeyo.

sentences.en: Why do you always leave your stuff on the table?

sentences.t: 마르코가 그래요. 길 잃는 것도 탐험의 한 방법이라고.
sentences.en: Marco says: getting lost is just another way to explore.
sentences.r: raenggwiga geuraeyo. gil inneun geotdo tamheomui han bangbeobirago.

sentences.t: 그 사람은 제가 몇 년째 알고 지낸 줄 몰라요.
sentences.en: She doesn't know that I've known her for years.
sentences.r: geu sarameun jega myeot nyeonjjae algo jinaen jul mollayo.

sentences.en: I didn't go to the party because I was really tired.

sentences.t: 별로 안 배고파서 가벼운 걸로 시킬게요.
sentences.en: I'm not very hungry, I'll order something small.
sentences.r: byeollo an baegopaseo gabyeoun geollo sikilgeyo.

sentences.en: Marco says exercise is the best pill.
I'm so hungry I'm going to order everything.

sentences.t: 제 방이 화장실 바로 옆이라 다행이에요.
sentences.en: My room's right next to the bathroom, lucky me.
sentences.r: je bangi hwajangsil baro yeopira dahaengi-eyo.

sentences.t: 커피를 시킬지 더 센 걸 시킬지 모르겠어요.
sentences.en: I don't know whether to order coffee or something stronger.
sentences.r: keopireul sikilji deo sen geol sikilji moreugesseoyo.

sentences.t: 아무한테도 그 얘기 한 적 없다고 했어요.
sentences.en: He told me he'd never told that to anyone.
sentences.r: amuhantedo geu yaegi han jeok eopdago haesseoyo.
